---
title: "Church of England Society for Providing Homes for Waifs and Strays"
---

## Church of England Society for Providing Homes for Waifs and Strays

**Type:** organization

### About

The Waifs and Strays' Society was founded in 1881 by Edward de Montjoie Rudolf (1852 -1933).  There is an interesting history at http://www.hiddenlives.org.uk/articles/history.html The organization survives as The Children’s Society, see http://www.childrenssociety.org.uk/

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
